hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'rm -rf /|rm -rf \.|DROP TABLE|DROP DATABASE|DELETE FROM.*WHERE 1|git push.*--force|git push.*-f'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "BLOCKED: Dangerous command detected. Use a safer alternative."}'; fi

which osascript >/dev/null 2>&1 && osascript -e 'display notification "Claude needs your attention" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Glass"' || (which notify-send >/dev/null 2>&1 && notify-send 'Claude Code' 'Claude needs your attention') || true
